name: Witchcrafter Garden
desc:
When this card is activated: add 1 level 4 or lower "Witchcrafter" monster from your Deck to your hand, or if you control a "Witchcrafter" monster, you can add 1 "Witchcrafter" Trap, instead. You can only use 1 of the following effects of "Witchcrafter Garden" per turn, and only once that turn.
●If a "Witchcrafter" monster you control would discard to activate an effect, you can send this card from your field to the GY instead.
●During your End Phase, if you control a "Witchcrafter" monster, while this card is in your GY: You can place this card face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone.
